title: INVELON Package Manifest
description: Schema for *.dependencies.json files consumed by PackageManifestInstaller. Any file ending in .dependencies.json found anywhere in the project is auto-discovered and shown as a tab in the installer window. To add a new template, create a new *.dependencies.json file anywhere inside its XLINK'd folder.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for forward-compatibility checks. Current version: '2.0'.

templateName.description: Human-readable name shown as the tab label in the installer. E.g. 'InvelonARVsion VR Template'.

unityVersion.description: Minimum Unity version required. Informational only. E.g. '6000.3'.

renderPipeline.description: Render pipeline required. Informational only. E.g. 'URP', 'HDRP', 'Built-in'.

menuGroup.description: Optional. If provided, the installer registers a MenuItem shortcut under this path. E.g. 'INVELON/VR Template'. Leave empty to omit the shortcut.

packages.description: List of UPM packages required by this template.

version.description: Minimum required version (semantic). For 'git' packages used only as display info. E.g. '3.3.1'.

source.description: Package source. 'registry' = Unity Registry. 'git' = Git URL. 'openupm' = OpenUPM scoped registry.

url.description: Required for 'git' (full Git URL with optional #tag/branch, e.g. 'https://github.com/Org/Repo.git#1.0.0') and 'openupm' (registry URL, always 'https://package.openupm.com').

scopeName.description: Optional. For 'openupm' only. Display name for the scoped registry entry in manifest.json. Defaults to the 'url' value if omitted. E.g. 'package.openupm.com'.

displayName.description: Human-readable package name shown in the installer table. E.g. 'XR Interaction Toolkit'.

optional.description: If true, the package is shown in a separate 'Optional' section and excluded from 'Install All'. Defaults to false.

installNote.description: Optional note shown below the package row. Use for manual fallback instructions or caveats.
